tasks.title: Normalize DiffViewer shell API
tasks.description: Refactor DiffViewer so callers provide its rendering state and diff content while the component owns only MergeView lifecycle and fallback presentation.
steps: Inspect src/lib/components/DiffViewer.svelte and confirm the component exposes explicit loading/empty/error/ready handling without repo-fetch logic
Open /spike-d and confirm the ready state renders a read-only MergeView for caller-provided content

tasks.title: Add spike shell-state harness
tasks.description: Update /spike-d so the Diff tab demonstrates loading, empty, error, and ready shell states using the new DiffViewer contract.
steps: Open /spike-d and verify each shell state is reachable and visually distinct
Confirm no repo-changed listener or Tauri diff fetch was introduced in the route for this bead

nonGoals: Fetching real diff data from Tauri commands
Building changed-file list or repo-backed selection workflow
Listening to repo-changed or implementing targeted refresh behavior
Watcher lifecycle, debounce tuning, or Rust event payload changes
